memory.description: Default destination for one-off but durable fixes, facts, and reviewed problem-solution records.

instinct.description: Promote when a workflow or decision pattern repeats with clear evidence across sessions.

learned-skill.description: Promote when the solution is reusable, multi-step, and broadly applicable beyond one project incident.

role-pack.description: Promote when the pattern is role-specific and changes how a role should operate by default.

stack-pack.description: Promote when the pattern is stack-specific and should become part of a stack constraint package.
